title: podolobium scandens
intro: Podolobium scandens, also known as the creeping golden-pea or climbing golden-pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Podolobium scandens include reducing swelling and promoting healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
